positive: A whimsical, stylized portrait of a stylized astronaut floating above a bioluminescent forest. The astronaut is depicted with a retro-futuristic bubble helmet and is gently interacting with floating, glowing fauna. The forest canopy is dense with glowing mushrooms and exotic flora. Use a high-contrast, limited color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, and neon cyan. The style should be highly refined, clean vector art combined with detailed digital painting, perfect for screen printing. Central composition, clean silhouettes, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with glowing elements providing the main light source. 8K, ultra-detailed, artwork.
